title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies:
Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
